cases.title: GET /api/v1/events returns HTTP 200 paginated envelope for participant browse
preconditions: At least three events in participant-visible states (e.g. RegistrationOpen)
Authenticated Participant JWT
Events seeded with distinct startAt values for sort verification
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1 with Participant Authorization bearer
Inspect HTTP status code and response envelope fields
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope (items, page=1, pageSize=12, total, totalPages); items.length <= 12; items sorted by startAt ascending per default sort; each item includes eventId, name, state, startAt, location, and coverImageUrl when set; satisfies FR-28 browse paginated event listings and FR-31 total count metadata

cases.title: Events list page 2 returns correct slice with total per testing-plan §3
preconditions: At least 13 participant-visible events (exceeds default pageSize of 12)
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12&sort=startAt:asc and record total and totalPages
GET /api/v1/events?page=2&pageSize=12&sort=startAt:asc
Compare page-2 items to expected second slice ordered by startAt ascending
cases.expected: Page-2 response has page=2, pageSize=12, total matching page-1 total, totalPages=ceil(total/12), items are the correct contiguous slice per testing-plan §3 row Events list page 2 → correct slice + total (AC-13)

cases.title: Participant searches event browse list via q across name, location, or description
preconditions: Discoverable event with unique name token (e.g. Campus Workshop Alpha)
Discoverable event with unique location token (e.g. Building C Room 204)
Discoverable event with unique description token not present in name or location
Additional discoverable events seeded without those tokens
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events?q=Campus+Workshop+Alpha&page=1&pageSize=12 with Participant token
GET /api/v1/events?q=Building+C+Room+204&page=1&pageSize=12 with same token
GET /api/v1/events?q=<unique-description-token>&page=1&pageSize=12 with same token
cases.expected: HTTP 200 for each query; items include the matching event for name, location, and description searches respectively; non-matching discoverable events excluded; q parameter applies ILIKE search across name, location, and description per API design GET /events and listing matrix

cases.title: Participant filters event browse list by state
preconditions: Seeded events in RegistrationOpen and RegistrationClosed states visible to participants
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events?state=RegistrationOpen&page=1&pageSize=12 with Participant token
GET /api/v1/events?state=RegistrationClosed&page=1&pageSize=12 with same token
cases.expected: RegistrationOpen filter returns only events with state RegistrationOpen; RegistrationClosed filter returns only RegistrationClosed events; optional state filter on GET /events supports participant browse basic filters per page list and API paginated list endpoints table

cases.title: Combined search, state filter, and pagination on event browse
preconditions: Multiple RegistrationOpen events containing 'workshop' in name plus RegistrationOpen events without that term
At least 13 RegistrationOpen events matching q=workshop to exceed one page
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events?q=workshop&state=RegistrationOpen&page=1&pageSize=12&sort=startAt:asc
GET /api/v1/events?q=workshop&state=RegistrationOpen&page=2&pageSize=12&sort=startAt:asc
cases.expected: Both responses apply search and state filter before paging; total reflects filtered row count not full catalog; page-2 items are correct slice of filtered set; demonstrates FR-28 browse with search and filter together

cases.title: Participant event discovery page renders paginated card grid with FilterBar controls
preconditions: Web app running with at least 13 discoverable seeded events
At least one event has cover image uploaded
Participant authenticated on event discovery browse route (/events)
steps: Navigate to participant event discovery browse list
Verify FilterBar shows debounced search input, state filter select, and sort select
Confirm paginated card grid shows at most 12 cards with cover thumbnail or fallback illustration
Verify pagination shows item range label (e.g. Showing 1–12 of N) with prev/next controls
Use Next pagination control to advance to page 2
cases.expected: Browse list displays search, state filter, and sort controls, paginated card grid (16:9 cover or fallback), and server-driven pagination with range label below grid; page change fetches next server page per page list event discovery, listing pages §3, and AC-14

cases.title: Changing search, filter, or sort criteria resets browse list to page 1
preconditions: More than 12 discoverable events seeded
Participant on event discovery browse page currently viewing page 2
steps: Navigate to page 2 of event browse list
Enter a search term in the search input and submit or debounce trigger
Observe resulting page index and network request parameters
Clear search, apply a state filter, and observe page reset again
Change sort select from startAt:asc to updatedAt:desc and observe page reset
cases.expected: Each search, filter, or sort change resets pagination to page 1 and issues GET /events with page=1 and updated q, state, or sort parameters; matches page list and AC-18a requirement that changing criteria resets to page 1

cases.title: Event list service returns paginated envelope with correct total at DB boundary
preconditions: Known count of participant-visible events (e.g. 15 total) persisted in PostgreSQL
Participant actor context
Real database test harness with transaction rollback per test
steps: Invoke eventService.listEvents(participantContext, { page: 1, pageSize: 12 })
Compare items.length, total, and totalPages to seeded row count via direct COUNT query
cases.expected: Service returns paginated result with total=15, totalPages=2, items.length=12 on page 1; total reflects full matching count before paging per integration target paginated list queries and FR-31

cases.title: Event list repository applies search and state filter before OFFSET/LIMIT at DB boundary
preconditions: Seeded mix of RegistrationOpen and RegistrationClosed events with overlapping name and location tokens
Participant actor context
PostgreSQL test database
steps: Invoke event list query with q=workshop, state=RegistrationOpen, page=1, pageSize=12
Compare returned total to direct COUNT of rows matching both filters in persistence layer
Invoke event list query with q matching only location field and verify filtered total
cases.expected: Module returns total equal to filtered row count in database; items on page 1 are correct first slice of filtered set; search matches name, location, or description ILIKE and state filter applied in query before paging not post-filtered in memory

cases.title: Search with no matching events returns empty items with valid pagination metadata
preconditions: Discoverable events seeded with names not containing 'zzznomatch'
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events?q=zzznomatch&page=1&pageSize=12 with Participant token
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items: [], total=0, totalPages=0 (or equivalent), page=1, pageSize=12; empty search result is a valid browse outcome with intact envelope

cases.title: Event browse page beyond last page returns empty items with valid metadata
preconditions: Five participant-visible events seeded (totalPages=1 at pageSize 12)
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 and record totalPages
GET /api/v1/events?page={totalPages+1}&pageSize=12
cases.expected: Page beyond totalPages returns items: [] with unchanged total, totalPages, page, and pageSize per AC-13 paginated list boundary behavior for participant event browse

cases.title: Invalid pagination parameters on event browse return 400 INVALID_PAGINATION
preconditions: Authenticated Participant JWT
Discoverable events seeded
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=0&pageSize=12 with Participant token
GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=101 with Participant token
GET /api/v1/events?page=abc&pageSize=12 with Participant token
cases.expected: Each invalid request returns HTTP 400 with error code INVALID_PAGINATION; no partial event data returned; pagination contract enforces page >= 1 and pageSize max 100

cases.title: Invalid state filter value on event browse returns 400 INVALID_INPUT
preconditions: Authenticated Participant JWT
RegistrationOpen events seeded
steps: GET /api/v1/events?state=NotARealState&page=1&pageSize=12 with Participant token
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with error code INVALID_INPUT; must not return events in unintended states; invalid filter enum rejected per listing pages §4 and API design strict input validation

cases.title: Empty browse result shows empty state when search or filter matches no events
preconditions: Discoverable events seeded
Participant on event discovery browse page
steps: Enter search term that matches no events
Submit search and wait for list update
cases.expected: Card grid region shows 'No results match your filters' empty state (not an error page); Clear filters action available; pagination reflects zero total or hides appropriately; user can clear search to restore results per listing pages empty-state contract

cases.title: Unauthenticated event browse API request returns 401
preconditions: API running
No Authorization header
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 without credentials
cases.expected: HTTP 401 with typed error envelope; unauthenticated access to protected GET /events rejected per AC-15 and auth required for non-public endpoints

cases.title: Participant browse excludes Draft events via role-filtered visibility at DB layer
preconditions: Seeded Draft event and RegistrationOpen event in same organizing unit
Participant actor context
PostgreSQL test database
steps: Invoke event list query for participant with no state filter, page=1, pageSize=100
Verify returned eventIds against persisted rows by state
cases.expected: Draft events excluded from participant browse results; RegistrationOpen and other participant-visible states included; role-filtered event states per API design GET /events (paginated; role-filtered event states)

cases.title: Event browse returns single paginated page not full catalog in one response
preconditions: More than 12 participant-visible events seeded
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 with Participant token
Verify items.length and total fields
cases.expected: Response contains at most 12 items while total reflects full matching row count; client receives one page at a time per NFR-05 and AC-14 (no unbounded full-catalog payload in a single call)

cases.title: Event browse page change triggers single paginated API request not full dataset load
preconditions: More than 12 discoverable events seeded
Participant on event discovery browse page with network inspection available
steps: Load page 1 and record GET /events request with page=1
Click Next to page 2
Verify only one new GET /events request with page=2 is issued
cases.expected: Page navigation fetches exactly one server page per interaction; no client-side slicing of a previously loaded full catalog per AC-14, NFR-05, and listing pages server-driven pagination guidance

cases.title: Invalid sort parameter on event browse returns 400 INVALID_INPUT
preconditions: Authenticated Participant JWT
Discoverable events seeded
steps: GET /api/v1/events?sort=notAField:asc&page=1&pageSize=12 with Participant token
GET /api/v1/events?sort=startAt:sideways&page=1&pageSize=12 with Participant token
cases.expected: Each invalid sort request returns HTTP 400 with error code INVALID_INPUT; no partial event data returned; invalid sort field or direction rejected per AC-18b and API design §3

cases.title: GET /events with sort=updatedAt:desc returns events ordered by updatedAt descending
preconditions: At least three participant-visible events with distinct updatedAt timestamps
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events?sort=updatedAt:desc&page=1&pageSize=12 with Participant token
Verify item order matches updatedAt descending sequence from seed data
cases.expected: HTTP 200; items ordered by updatedAt descending; sort query param accepted as allowed alternative to default startAt:asc per AC-18d and listing matrix

cases.title: Sort select on discovery page updates API sort query param
preconditions: Multiple discoverable events seeded with distinct updatedAt values
Participant on event discovery browse page (/events)
steps: Observe initial GET /events network request uses default sort=startAt:asc
Select 'Recently updated' (or equivalent) sort option mapping to updatedAt:desc in FilterBar
Inspect resulting GET /events request query parameters and card order
cases.expected: Sort select change issues GET /events with sort=updatedAt:desc and resets to page=1; displayed card order reflects updatedAt descending per AC-18d and page list sort control mapping

cases.title: Discovery cards show registration status badge when participant has active registration
preconditions: Participant registered for at least one discoverable event (e.g. Registered state)
Participant registered for zero other visible events on same browse page
Participant authenticated on event discovery browse page
steps: Navigate to event discovery browse list
Locate card for event with active registration
Locate card for event without registration
cases.expected: Registered event card displays registration status badge or overlay (e.g. Registered); unregistered event card shows neutral state without registered overlay; per-event status visible on discovery cards per FR-28 behavior and page list registration status badge requirement
